title: Slav Defense
shortDescription: A solid answer to the Queen's Gambit with 1.d4 d5 2.c4 c6, defending d5 while keeping the light-squared bishop active.

children.comment: White challenges d5 with the Queen's Gambit.
The Slav Defense supports d5 without blocking the light-squared bishop.
Black temporarily wins the c4 pawn.
White prevents ...b5 from securely holding the pawn.
Black develops the bishop actively before playing ...e6.

line.name: Main Line: 4...dxc4 and 5.a4
line.description: The classical Slav main line. Black accepts the c4 pawn and develops the bishop outside the pawn chain.

line.name: Main Line: 4...dxc4 5.a4 Bf5
line.description: The principal Slav setup with active bishop development.

line.name: Main Line: Bf5 Deep Setup
line.description: A deeper classical line with active development and pressure on the center.

line.name: Slav Endgame: Queen Trade
line.description: Black accepts a simplified position with a sound pawn structure.

line.name: Against 4.Qc2
line.description: Black keeps the center flexible and develops the bishop.

children.comment: The Smyslov move develops while preparing ...Bf5 and ...Nb4.

line.name: Smyslov Variation: ...Na6
line.description: Black develops the queen's knight flexibly and supports ...b5.

line.name: Main Line: Smyslov Variation
line.description: Black chooses ...Na6 and develops with flexibility.

line.name: Smyslov Variation: Deep Line
line.description: Black combines ...Na6, ...Bg4 and ...e6 with flexible piece play.

line.name: Main Line: 4...dxc4 5.a4 e6
line.description: Black delays the bishop development and aims for a solid setup.

children.comment: Black supports the extra pawn and gains space.

line.name: Holding the Extra Pawn with ...b5
line.description: Black supports the c4 pawn and gains queenside space.

line.name: Geller Gambit
line.description: White sacrifices a pawn for central space; Black holds the extra pawn and counterattacks.

line.name: Geller Gambit: Main Line
line.description: Black holds the extra pawn and attacks White's advanced center.

line.name: Slav Pawn-Holding Chain
line.description: Black supports c4 with ...b5 and expands on the queenside.

children.comment: White builds a broad center and offers material.

line.name: Steiner Variation: 4...a6
line.description: Black prepares ...b5 and keeps the queenside flexible.

line.name: Steiner Variation: Queenside Expansion
line.description: Black uses ...a6 and ...b5 to seize queenside space.

line.name: Schlechter Slav Setup
line.description: Black uses ...g6 and ...Bg7 for a resilient kingside fianchetto.

line.name: Schlechter Slav: Fianchetto Main Line
line.description: Black builds a resilient setup with ...g6 and ...Bg7.

line.name: Transition to the Semi-Slav
line.description: Black closes the light-squared bishop in exchange for a very solid center.

line.name: Semi-Slav Transition: Meran Setup
line.description: Black transitions into a Meran structure with ...e6 and ...dxc4.

line.name: Semi-Slav Transition: Botvinnik Structure
line.description: Black accepts a sharp center and queenside pawn chain.

children.comment: White chooses a quiet setup and prepares Bxc4.
Black develops the bishop before locking it in.

line.name: Main Line: Early e3
line.description: White prepares Bxc4 while Black develops naturally.

line.name: Quiet Slav: 3.Nf3 Nf6 4.e3
line.description: Black keeps a sound structure and develops the bishop before ...e6.

line.name: Quiet Slav: Nh4
line.description: Black preserves the bishop with ...Bg6 and accepts doubled h-pawns if needed.

line.name: Quiet Slav: Bishop Pair Structure
line.description: Black accepts doubled h-pawns to gain the bishop pair and open the h-file.

line.name: Quiet Slav: Qb3 Pressure
line.description: Black meets pressure on b7 with Qb6 and exchanges queens if favorable.

line.name: Against a Catalan-Style g3 Setup
line.description: Black maintains the Slav center and develops the bishop actively.

line.name: Against g3: Main Setup
line.description: Black develops the bishop outside the chain and then plays ...e6.

line.name: Against Catalan Setup: Deep Line
line.description: Black combines ...Bf5 and ...e6 with pressure on the queenside.

line.name: Against Early a4
line.description: Black develops normally and uses ...Bf5 before ...e6.

children.comment: White exchanges and reaches a symmetrical pawn structure.

line.name: Exchange Slav: Basic Setup
line.description: A symmetrical structure where Black develops actively and avoids passivity.

line.name: Exchange Slav: Bf4 Main Line
line.description: Black mirrors development and fights for the c-file.

line.name: Exchange Slav: c-File Pressure
line.description: Black develops symmetrically and fights for the only open file.

line.name: Against Early cxd5
line.description: Black recaptures and develops symmetrically.

line.name: Exchange Slav: Early Nf3
line.description: Black develops naturally and aims for ...Bf5 and ...e6.

line.name: Against 3.Nc3
line.description: Black develops with ...Nf6 and keeps both ...dxc4 and ...e6 available.

line.name: Against 3.e3
line.description: Black develops the bishop actively and maintains the Slav structure.
